# loadedComposition()

**Instance Method**

Returns the composition loaded in the view.

## Declaration

```swift
func loadedComposition() -> QCComposition!
```

## Return Value

The composition loaded in the view; otherwise `nil`.

## Loading a Composition

- **loadComposition(fromFile:)**: Loads the composition file located at the specified path.
- **load(_:)**: Loads a [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCComposition] object into the view.
- **unloadComposition()**: Unloads the composition from the view.
